item.title: Version 2.1.51
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.1.51

What's New

Version 2.1.24 — Seamless Cloud Synchronization

  • 🔄 Seamless Cloud Sync: Your chat list now stays perfectly in sync with your cloud account. Any changes you make are instantly reflected across your devices.
  • 📥 Automatic History Recovery: Chat messages are now intelligently restored from the cloud the moment you open a conversation, ensuring you never lose your conversation history.
  • 🔡 Improved Chat Reliability: Resolved several underlying issues to ensure that every chat session opens predictably and reliably every time.
  • ✨ Sidebar Enhancements: Added a live session counter and improved the sidebar visibility for better insight into your active conversations.
  • 🪟 Window Behavior Polish: Refined how the app transitions between full-screen and accessory modes to provide a smoother, more intuitive experience.

  • 🔡 Improved Chat Reliability: Resolved several underlying issues to ensure that every chat session opens predictably and reliably every time.
  • ✨ Sidebar Enhancements: Added a live session counter and improved the sidebar visibility for better insight into your active conversations.
  • 🪟 Window Behavior Polish: Refined how the app transitions between full-screen and accessory modes to provide a smoother, more intuitive experience.

What's New

Version 2.1.22 — Seamless Cloud Synchronization

  • 🔄 Seamless Cloud Sync: Your chat list now stays perfectly in sync with your cloud account. Any changes you make are instantly reflected across your devices.
  • 📥 Automatic History Recovery: Chat messages are now intelligently restored from the cloud the moment you open a conversation, ensuring you never lose your conversation history.
  • 🔡 Improved Chat Reliability: Resolved several underlying issues to ensure that every chat session opens predictably and reliably every time.
  • ✨ Sidebar Enhancements: Added a live session counter and improved the sidebar visibility for better insight into your active conversations.
  • 🪟 Window Behavior Polish: Refined how the app transitions between full-screen and accessory modes to provide a smoother, more intuitive experience.

item.title: Version 2.1.14
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.1.14

What's New

Version 2.1.13 — Security & Accessibility Improvements

  • ⌨️ Escape Key Fix: Resolved an issue where pressing the Escape key would unintentionally hide the application while in accessory mode.

item.title: Version 2.1.13
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.1.13

What's New

Version 2.1.9 — Enhanced Browsing & Window Stability

  • 🌐 Browser Popup Support: Enjoy a more complete browsing experience with new support for popups and "target=_blank" links, opening seamlessly in new tabs.
  • 📺 Fullscreen Protection: Improved stability by automatically disabling accessory mode transitions while in fullscreen mode to prevent UI layout issues.
  • 🪟 Refined Window Management: Enhanced window snapping and collapsing functionality when outside of accessory mode for a smoother desktop experience.
  • 🛠️ UI Reliability: Fixed window miniaturization behavior in accessory mode to ensure a consistent and predictable interface.
